title: AutoExecute Field Schema
description: Schema for Task Master auto-execution configuration. This field enables tasks to be automatically executed during scheduled time windows using commands defined in allowed_tasks.yml.

enabled.description: Whether auto-execution is enabled for this task. Set to false to temporarily disable without removing configuration.

taskKey.description: Key from allowed_tasks.yml that defines the command to execute. Must match exactly (case-sensitive).

schedule.description: Execution schedule type. 'nightly' = 01:00-05:00, 'custom' requires timeWindow definition.

timeWindow.description: Custom time window for execution. Required when schedule='custom'. Times in 24-hour format (0-23).

endHour.description: End hour (0-23, inclusive). Example: 5 for 05:00. Can be less than startHour for overnight windows.

daysOfWeek.description: Days of week to execute (0=Monday, 6=Sunday). Omit for daily execution.

retryOnFailure.description: Whether to retry failed executions automatically

maxRetries.description: Maximum number of retry attempts after initial failure

notifyOnCompletion.description: Whether to send notification upon task completion (future feature)

lastExecuted.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last execution. Auto-updated by executor.

executionHistory.description: Ring buffer of last 10 execution results. Oldest entries are removed when limit reached.

exitCode.description: Process exit code. 0 = success, non-zero = failure

stdout.description: First 1000 characters of stdout (full output in log files)

stderr.description: First 1000 characters of stderr (full output in log files)
